query:
SELECT 
  u.id as user_id,
  u.name as user_name,
  u.phone,
  u.roles,
  p.id as partner_id,
  p.name as partner_name,
  p.isActive as partner_is_active
FROM users u
INNER JOIN partners p ON u.id = p.userId
WHERE p.isActive = 1 
  AND (u.roles IS NULL OR u.roles NOT LIKE '%cityPartner%');
